title: EVALUATION OF THE EVEN DEVELOPMENT OF SPORTS INFRASTRUCTURE AIMED AT IMPROVING THE ABILITIES OF MASS, AMATEUR AND HIGH-PERFORMANCE ATHLETES: FROM THE POINT OF VIEW OF RESIDENTS OF KUPIŠKIS DISTRICT
author: Tomas Gabriūnas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Research work was carried out in 2022-2023. A quantitative research method - questionnaire - was chosen for the study. Anonymous questionnaires were created. The sample of the questionnaire survey is composed in such a way that its characteristics reflect the characteristics of the general population, that is, it must be representative. 385 residents of Kupiškis district municipality were interviewed. Respondents were both women and men, regardless of age group, but not younger than 18 years, education, social class.
